title: Bug: `max_tokens` from config.yaml is silently ignored — never propagated to AIAgent, causing output truncation on Ollama Cloud / zai / custom endpoints

title: ollama extension: Gemini 3 thinking models fail with 400 "missing thought_signature" in tool calls
summary:
## Summary

The bundled `ollama` extension at `~/.gsd/agent/extensions/ollama/ollama-chat-provider.js` only handles `<think>...</think>` inline thinking format. It does not propagate Gemini 3's structured `thoughtSignature` field, so the first tool call against any Gemini 3 cloud model returns HTTP

Removes Anthropic Claude as the main AI for DJ skills + taste analysis and replaces it with a fallback chain so the app keeps working when no cloud key is available.

title: [PR] fix(security): prevent SSRF in image URL fetching
summary:

- Add URL validation to `GetImageFromUrl()` to prevent Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) attacks
- Add `IsPrivateIP()` helper to `common/network` package
- Use `UserContentRequestHTTPClient` instead of bare `http.Get()`

title: [PR] feat(agent): add native OpenClaw support
summary:
## Summary

- Adds OpenClaw ("claw") as a new agent with full support for model configuration, MCP servers, skills, and onboarding skip
- Adds `--telegram` flag to `kdn init` for headless Telegram mode — runs the OpenClaw gateway and auto-approves pairing requests instead of the interactive TUI
